creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Thu Jun  6 18:42:21 2013
New Revision: 320119
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/320119

Log:
  - Correct mistake which prevented redmine-http-auth and redmine-backlogs from
    building
  
  PR:		ports/179361
  Submitted by:	John Marino <draco@marino.st>

Modified:
  head/www/redmine/Makefile
  head/www/redmine/bsd.redmine.mk

Modified: head/www/redmine/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/redmine/Makefile	Thu Jun  6 17:41:37 2013	(r320118)
+++ head/www/redmine/Makefile	Thu Jun  6 18:42:21 2013	(r320119)
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	redmine
 PORTVERSION=	2.3.1
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTREVISION=	2
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_RUBYFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}

Modified: head/www/redmine/bsd.redmine.mk
==============================================================================
--- head/www/redmine/bsd.redmine.mk	Thu Jun  6 17:41:37 2013	(r320118)
+++ head/www/redmine/bsd.redmine.mk	Thu Jun  6 18:42:21 2013	(r320119)
@@ -74,7 +74,7 @@ redmine-plugin-plist:
 .endif
 
 do-install:
-	${MKDIR} "${WWWDIR}/vendor/${REDMINE_PLUGIN_NAME}"
+	${MKDIR} "${WWWDIR}/plugins/${REDMINE_PLUGIN_NAME}"
 	${TAR} -C "${WRKSRC}" -cf - --exclude '*.orig' . | ${TAR} -C "${WWWDIR}/plugins/${REDMINE_PLUGIN_NAME}" -xf -
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
